description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: If an AD loses its budget due to losing its Ranked Delegate rank, the full contents of the AD Buffer can be paid out in the next monthly compensation cycle, except as specified in [A.1.5.8.1 - Payout Limitations For ADs Triggering Atlas Edit Weekly Cycle Proposals](baea6842-2e17-4587-8d3c-5ac7a3c8b6e6).
